name: N.K Industries Limited
summary: N.K Industries Limited manufactures, sells, and trades in castor oil and its derivatives in India. Its products include commercial grade castor oil, cold pressed castor oil, castor oil British Pharma 93 grade, castor Hi protein, first pressed degummed castor oil, pale pressed grade, sodium sulphate anhydrous, refined castor oil, crude glycerin, de oiled cakes-castor meals, 12-hydroxy stearic acid, ricinoleic acid, hydrogenated castor oil flakes/powder, and high protein castor meal. The company also serves customers in Asia, Africa, Europe, the United States, and South America. N.K Industries Limited was incorporated in 1987 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
